manifest.name: Interactive Map

name: Interactive Map

releases.author: user-A100
releases.description:
Initial release of Interactive Map plugin.

Features:
- Embed interactive SVG maps in Obsidian notes
- Hover to highlight and scale regions
- Ctrl/Cmd + hover for native page preview popup
- Click regions to navigate to corresponding notes
- Built-in China provinces map with 34 regions
- Province → city → district drill-down support
- Two scripts to generate maps from public DataV GeoJSON data
- Drag & drop SVG files to auto-insert map code blocks
- Auto-create missing notes on click (configurable)
releases.name: v1.0.0
